label: Western Europe multi-era geometry + politics pack
description: Build the M16 multi-era pack we-multi-era-v1: period geometry packs for 1444/1836/1936 plus curated-politics scenarios, region quality matrix, and migration notes.

steps.title: Apply geometry + resolve politics for all eras
Emit migration notes (also produced by build)

honesty: Period geometry is Western Europe priority-region scoped only.
Outside the priority region, scaffold geometry remains.
Politics are curated overlays; residual modern baselines may remain outside elevated theaters.
Use scaffold_province_id as the cross-era join key; era IDs differ by pack.
